system.effect: The character suffers −30 to Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill tests. They also suffer −30 to Perception-based tests that rely on sight. Movement is reduced to half.
system.removal: Depends on the source. Temporary blinding (e.g., flash grenades) wears off after the specified duration. Permanent blinding requires medical or bionic intervention.

description.value: The character cannot see. They suffer −30 to all Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill tests, −30 to all Perception-based tests that rely on sight, and can only move at half their normal rate. Opponents in melee gain +20 to hit the Blinded character.
